stemHtml:
Refer to figure.
What conditions are most likely to prevail in winter at an aerodrome located in square 3B?

options.a: Mainly overcast at 8000 ft, visibility less than 5 km in continuous moderate rain
options.b: Intermittent thunderstorms otherwise generally clear skies with good visibility
options.c: 6 – 8 oktas SC and ST, visibility moderate to poor in drizzle
options.d: Broken CU base 2000 ft, visibility more than 5 km, occasional showers of rain or snow
